title: Cross break animation
description: Improves the animation for breaking blocks, ideal for bed wars.
body:
This resourse pack improves the breaking block animation to improve visivility and giving you a more clean and visable veiw. This pack is specificaly designed for bedwars. The breaking animation is a cross on all sides of the block.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
